description_long: This is a single-story detached house situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to a garage. The house features a gable roof with a dark color, contrasting with the light-colored exterior walls. There is a small front yard and a paved walkway connecting the street to the main entrance. Windows are symmetrically placed on the visible facades, and the garage is attached to the side of the house. The property is bordered by a road and surrounded by a grassy lawn, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, attached garage, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and garage door facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, attached garage, and the driveway extending to the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area and the back side of the house with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, garage, and the driveway connecting to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small paved walkway, no porch or columns, directly accessible from the driveway.
